channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: 'The ultimate power solution for homes, RVs, and professionals:' EcoFlow Delta Pro 3 handles power outages, road trips, and off-grid weekends — and it’s $800 off
item.description: Get ready for the next big outage or camping trip with the EcoFlow Solar Generator Delta Pro 3 portable power station with solar panels, currently $800 off.

item.title: British businesses still aren’t bouncing back from cyberattacks – here’s how to tackle the problem
item.description: British businesses face lasting impacts from cyberattacks—discover why recovery and resilience are now essential..

item.title: Le mystère de la page maudite qui fait complètement crasher les Samsung Galaxy
item.description: Un bug étrange touche les smartphones Samsung Galaxy sous puce Exynos : l'ouverture d'un site web spécifique provoque des redémarrages intempestifs, et parfois même une extinction pure et simple.

item.title: These licensed PowerA Nintendo controllers are less than half price of the official Pro Controller — and even work with Switch 2
item.description: PowerA has discounted some Switch and Switch 2 compatible gamepads.

item.title: I can’t put down two cheap headphones I tested this year — one’s better for budget audiophiles, one’s perfect for commuters
item.description: For cheap headphone buyers, the Soundpeats Cove Pro and OneOdio Focus A1 Pro are perfect — just for different people.

item.title: Eufy Omni C28 Review: Affordable and Full-Featured
item.description: Eufy's latest robot vacuum proves you can still get a great vac-mop without dropping four figures.

item.title: OpenAI drops plans to release an adult chatbot
item.description: OpenAI has "indefinitely" abandoned plans to release an a erotic chatbot for adults following concerns from employees and investors, the company confirmed to The Financial Times. Plans for such a feature, first announced in October 2025 for release in December last year, had already been delayed while company debated whether to release it all. It's the second app OpenAI has decided to shelf this week, after announcing on Tuesday that it was shutting down its Sora video generator. The adult-oriented chatbot, reportedly called "Citron mode," is now on hold with no planned release date. The compa...

item.title: How to Buy Ethical and Eco-Friendly Electronics (2026)
item.description: Electronic waste, conflict minerals, and poor labor conditions are just a few issues blighting the tech industry. Here’s how to shop more sustainably.

item.title: Mistral releases a new open-source model for speech generation
item.description: Mistral's new speech model can run on a smartwatch or a smartphone.

item.title: Mistral AI just released a text-to-speech model it says beats ElevenLabs — and it's giving away the weights for free
item.description: The enterprise voice AI market is in the middle of a land grab. ElevenLabs and IBM announced a collaboration just this week to bring premium voice capabilities into IBM's watsonx Orchestrate platform. Google Cloud has been expanding its Chirp 3 HD voices. OpenAI continues to iterate on its own speech synthesis. And the market underpinning all of this activity is enormous — voice AI crossed $22 billion globally in 2026, with the voice AI agents segment alone projected to reach $47.5 billion by 2034, according to industry estimates.On Thursday morning, Mistral AI entered that fight with a fundam...

item.title: How AI is teaching us to be more human
item.description: Used wisely, the technology can be a helpful coach. At a recent retreat I was attending, I found myself in one of those “hallway moments.” Walking out of a lecture, I was engaged in conversation with a fellow attendee. Soon it became clear we had differing opinions about the topic. As I felt myself getting tense, formulating my response in my mind, I caught a glimpse of myself in a wall of mirrors as we walked by a pilates studio on the property. I didn’t like what I saw—it was not my best self. I did not look calm, cool and collected; instead, I looked tense and ready to charge. The exact opp...

item.title: The open source blind spot in our supply chains
item.description: Supply chain attacks are increasing in volume, but open source vulnerabilities continue relatively unnoticed.

item.title: « Le pire des deux mondes » : nous n’aurons pas de Volkswagen électrique à 1 600 km d’autonomie en Europe, et c’est une bonne nouvelle
item.description: Alors que Volkswagen lance une voiture électrique à prolongateur d'autonomie en Chine, son PDG vient de confirmer que cette technologie n'arrivera pas en Europe, jugeant que cette solution n'aurait « aucun sens » chez nous.

item.title: À -50 %, la Xiaomi Watch 2 Pro est la montre connectée idéale et pas chère pour suivre vos activités
item.description: La Xiaomi Watch 2 Pro, notée 8/10 par nos soins, propose un bon suivi des activités sportives avec un GPS et un cardiofréquencemètre fiables. Elle a beau ne pas être la dernière montre connectée de la marque, elle reste une bonne référence à conseiller, surtout quand sa version 4G passe de 329 euros à 169 euros seulement.

item.title: I saw Hisense’s new mid-range mini-LED TV, and it could be the affordable set to beat thanks one key screen upgrade
item.description: Anti-reflection tech makes makes the most of mini-LED tech with impressive results.

item.title: 'Cybercriminals are industrializing deception': new report reveals how major global cybercrime syndicates have infiltrated trusted domains with millions now at risk - here's what you need to know
item.description: Outdated software, crypto fraud, and fake ecommerce sites are running rampant, losing people money and web assets.

item.title: CRKD is releasing a new version of its tiny Atom controller that's compatible with Switch 2 and has loads of meaningful upgrades
item.description: CRKD has announced a new version of its adorable Atom controller called the Atom+.

item.title: 139 voitures électriques testées sur long trajet : voici l’ultime classement (avec quelques biais)
item.description: Voici les 10 voitures électriques les plus rapides sur longs trajets, grâce à leur autonomie et leur recharge rapide. Un test réalisé par l'ADAC, l'une des associations allemandes les plus à la pointe sur le sujet. Mais l'étude comporte toutefois quelques biais, notamment pour l'autonomie sur autoroute.

item.title: Directive 8020 was 'designed with the PS5 in mind' and will offer 'sharper visuals' powered by PSSR and 'advanced ray tracing' to heighten the horror on PS5 Pro
item.description: Supermassive Games has revealed the PlayStation 5 and PlayStation 5 Pro features of its next major entry in its Dark Pictures Anthology, Directive 8020.

item.title: Meilleurs TV 55 pouces (140 cm) : quel modèle choisir en 2026 ? (OLED, QLED, Mini-LED)
item.description: La catégorie 55 pouces reste l'un des choix les plus populaires pour les téléviseurs. Voici notre sélection des meilleurs TV de 55 pouces à tous les prix, qu'elles soient OLED, Mini LED ou LCD, mais toujours en 4K HDR.

item.title: Hisense’s AI Agent Suite Brings Connection and Emotional Value to Smart Home Appliances
item.description: Your smart devices should add convenience and connection, not take it away.

item.title: The New ‘Faces of Death’ Trailer Lifts the Lid on the Movie’s Actual Plot
item.description: The burden of deciding whether or not the gruesome footage is 'real' has shifted from the audience to the movie's main character.

item.title: This Groundbreaking Omega Watch’s Accuracy Is Calibrated Using Sound
item.description: Thanks to a novel way of testing precision using acoustics, the Constellation Observatory is the first watch with no seconds hand to achieve Master Chronometer status.

item.title: HBO Max is now available in the UK — here are 5 great horror movies I recommend
item.description: HBO Max is home to plenty of great horror movies, and these are the five I recommend starting with.

item.title: Why the Pentagon loves Xbox controllers for laser weapons
item.description: Gamepad controls make high-energy lasers easier for troops to learn and use. But as AI takes over targeting and tracking, the real story is how little direct control humans may keep. One of the most distinctive features of the U.S. military’s high-energy laser weapon of choice isn’t the system itself—it’s how operators control it.

item.title: Regarder la TV sans internet sur son smartphone : la technologie 5G Broadcast arrive en France
item.description: Regarder la télévision en direct sur son smartphone sans consommer la moindre donnée mobile ? C'est la promesse de TDF et ça arrive bientôt. On vous explique le fonctionnement.

item.title: Dare we dream of Windows 11 with fewer ads and promos? Microsoft exec promises a 'calmer and more chill OS with fewer upsells is a goal'
item.description: A Windows 11 without endless promotion for Microsoft's services and games? It could happen, apparently.

item.title: Microsoft veut ramener la barre de tâches de Windows 10 sur Windows 11
item.description: Lancée dans une véritable opération de séduction, Microsoft promet de nouvelles options de personnalisation pour sa très critiquée barre des tâches.

item.title: Uber and Pony.ai are testing a robotaxi service for Europe
item.description: Uber and Chinese company Pony.ai are gearing up to launch a robotaxi service for Europe, starting with Zagreb in Croatia. The companies are working with Croatian company Verne, which will provide the service ecosystem and operational framework for the service. They’re using Arcfox Alpha T5 vehicles made by Beijing-based automaker BAIC Motor powered by Pony.ai’s Gen-7 autonomous driving system. Initially, the autonomous rides will be offered on Verne’s app, but they will eventually be available through Uber. In their announcement, the companies said they have already started on-road testing in ...

item.title: Meta et Google condamnés aux États-Unis pour leurs algorithmes addictifs : une décision historique
item.description: Après des semaines de suspense, Meta et Google viennent bel et bien d’être reconnus coupables de négligence envers la santé mentale de leurs utilisateurs et utilisatrices avec leurs plateformes aux algorithmes trop addictifs.

item.title: Hard Floors Cleaning Becomes Easy When Dreame’s New Aero Wet-Dry Vacuums Are On the Job, Now 20% Off
item.description: Two new next-gen cleaning machines use brains and cleaning brawn to make quick work of wet and dry messes.

item.title: Geekbench bannit les nouveaux CPUs Intel Core Ultra Plus à cause d’une techno controversée
item.description: Primate Labs, l'éditeur de la suite de benchmarks Geekbench, a indiqué que les nouveaux processeurs Intel Core Ultra Plus pourraient apparaître « invalides » dans les résultats de ses différents outils d'évaluation des performances. Une décision liée au déploiement d'une technologie jugée problématique : l'IBOT.

item.title: Ajax suffers major own goal as data breach hits personal info of 300,000 fans
item.description: A bug in an app allowed a hacker to view and tamper with the data, but a fix has since been implemented.

item.title: Pourquoi Forza Horizon 6 réclamera 32 Go de RAM pour explorer le Japon dans toute sa splendeur
item.description: Forza Horizon 6 est la prochaine claque graphique de ce début d'année 2026. Le jeu de course en monde ouvert de Playground Games vient de dévoiler ses fonctionnalités et configurations PC, avec quelques surprises à la clé.

item.title: Ce vidéoprojecteur lumineux (150 pouces, 4K, Dolby Atmos) perd la moitié de son prix et peut être livré en moins d’une semaine
item.description: Avec le JMGO O2S Ultra, vous aurez entre vos mains un vidéoprojecteur lumineux en 4K avec une remise de 50 % grâce à cette réduction d'AliExpress.

item.title: The Fire Stick 4K Plus has hit its lowest-ever price in Amazons Big Spring Sale — save $25 right now
item.description: Get the best Fire Stick deal at Amazon. Save 50% on the Amazon Fire TV Stick 4K Plus at Amazon.

item.title: BTS and Jimmy Fallon surprising fans is both adorable and hilarious
item.description: BTS joined Jimmy Fallon to surprise fans during a segment on "The Tonight Show".

item.title: ‘She’s Never Going to Age’: Porn Stars Are Embracing AI Clones to Stay Forever Young
item.description: AI companion platforms like OhChat and SinfulX are offering adult creators digital twins, who are always at their peak and stay monetizing.

item.title: Tesla s’apprête à lancer la Model Y L chinoise en Europe : la preuve avec ces documents
item.description: La Tesla Model Y L très pratique et actuellement réservée au marché chinois devrait bien faire son arrivée en Europe dans les prochaines semaines. Un document d'homologation officiel relayé par un connaisseur du sujet nous le confirme.

item.title: « La Nasa est déterminée à réaliser une fois de plus un exploit quasi impossible » : la stratégie américaine se redessine
item.description: La Nasa vient de révéler ses nouvelles orientations et sa vision pour l'exploration. En plaçant la Lune et l'occupation de l'orbite basse au cœur de ses priorités, les États-Unis redéfinissent leur approche. Voici brièvement les principaux axes de cette stratégie, en attendant un aperçu détaillé...

item.title: We found the best Apple deals from Amazons Spring Sale — save on AirPods, iPads, and MacBooks
item.description: See all the best Apple deals from the Amazon Big Spring Sale, including $50 off AirPods Pro 3 and $250 off M4 MacBook Air laptops.

item.title: On a roulé avec le dernier VTC électrique de Giant : un vrai « kick » au démarrage
item.description: Successeur de l’Expression E+, le Giant NewTour E+ offre ce qu’on attend du vélo de ville électrique moderne, avec de bonnes performances, un équipement très correct et un bon confort en supplément. Nous l'avons pris en main au CyclingWorld 2026.

item.title: Cap sur Mars : la NASA recycle sa station lunaire pour créer le vaisseau nucléaire du futur
item.description: La NASA change de cap et décide de recycler les composants de sa future station lunaire pour lancer une mission nucléaire vers Mars d'ici fin 2028. Ce projet, baptisé SR-1 Freedom, signe le retour de l’agence vers la propulsion atomique après des décennies d'essais infructueux.

item.title: Tesla a trouvé une drôle de solution pour rendre ses bornes de charge encore moins chères : les plier
item.description: Tesla vient d'améliorer une nouvelle fois ses Superchargeurs : avec leur nouvelle plateforme pliable, la marque peut déployer des stations entières de bornes de recharge deux fois plus rapidement et 20 % moins cher.

item.title: Im a tech editor, and I found 37 Big Spring Sale tech deals at Amazon Id actually buy
item.description: I'm a tech editor, and I found the top tech deals from Amazon's Big Spring Sale. Grab Sony headphones for $48, Kindles for $94, and $250 off MacBooks.

item.title: La solution radicale de Google contre la crise de la RAM est super astucieuse : voici TurboQuant
item.description: Google TurboQuant est un impressionnant algorithme capable de diviser par six la consommation de mémoire des modèles IA. Une solution parfaite contre la crise de la RAM ?

item.title: Amazons Big Spring Sale is actually really good: We found 100+ deals on Apple, DJI, Sony, and Shark
item.description: Amazon's Big Spring Sale is back from March 25 to 31. Shop the best deals on Apple, headphones, TVs, and more.

item.title: PixPro AZ653 : Kodak n’a pas disparu et lance un nouvel appareil photo pas cher au zoom x65 impressionnant
item.description: Depuis quelques années, Kodak reprend du poil de la bête avec de nouveaux appareils accessibles à l'image de son nouveau bridge PixPro AZ653.

item.title: Arnaque au faux conseiller bancaire : la France neutralise un réseau après le vol de 740 000 euros
item.description: Une filière d’arnaque au faux conseiller bancaire, pilotée par un « parrain » depuis le Maroc, a été démantelée. Avoir dépouillé des centaines de Français en un an, les escrocs ont été interpellés par les forces de l'ordre et déférés devant les tribunaux.

item.title: Amazon Big Spring Sale 2026: Live updates on Apple, Samsung, DJI, and Kindle deals
item.description: Get live updates on the Amazon Big Spring Sale 2026. We found record-low prices on Apple MacBooks, DJI drones, Kindles, Sony XM6 headphones, and more.

item.title: Im watching the Japanese GP for free this weekend — how to live stream F1 for free
item.description: How to watch F1 for free. Live stream the Japanese GP from the 2026 F1 season for free from anywhere in the world.

item.title: The Not-So-Simple Truth About Rats, Roaches, and the Other Urban ‘Pests’ We Made
item.description: Marlene Zuk's new book asks people to not villainize or valorize the urban critters that live all around us.

item.title: Why ICE Is Allowed to Impersonate Law Enforcement
item.description: “There's no accountability,” one expert tells WIRED of ICE’s ability to lie to the public. "The consequence of this is that it’s going to be a systemic harm across all law enforcement.”

item.title: Anduril’s Real War Is With Itself
item.description: From drones to missiles to submarines, the $30.5 billion defense startup wants to transform how the tools of war are made. It’s not all going as planned.

item.title: The Pitt is finally available to stream in the UK on HBO Max — be ready for the unmissable 'mass casualty trauma' you need to catch up with
item.description: After an agonizing 14 month wait, The Pitt is finally available to stream in the UK as HBO Max lands in good old Blighty. Frankly, you need to brace yourself for 'mass casualty trauma'.

item.title: Oversight Board tells Meta expanding Community Notes outside of US poses 'significant' risks
item.description: Meta didn't consult its Oversight Board last year when it announced sweeping policy changes to content moderation and a rollback of third-party fact checking in the United States in favor of Community Notes. But the company did ask the board for advice on how to expand the crowd-sourced fact checks to other countries.Now the Oversight Board is publishing its advice to Meta. In a 15,000-word policy advisory opinion, the group urged Meta to be cautious with an international rollout, warning that an expansion of the program could "pose significant human rights risks and contribute to tangible har...

item.title: This brilliant browser tool purposely makes AI chatbots worse
item.description: The extension’s designer calls it a ‘tiny tool of digital sabotage.’ A new browser extension just debuted that’s designed to be used in tandem with an AI chatbot. Its goal is to make the experience worse.

item.title: John Florence’s new surf series is a peek into his brand ambitions
item.description: A new six-part video series with Yeti shows the three-time world champ’s life away from contests, and the potential for his namesake outdoors brand. The most impressive move by three-time world surfing champ John Florence in his new video series isn’t riding a wave; it’s flying across open ocean on a catamaran while holding his puking 1-year-old son over a bucket....

item.title: Manus AI cleaned up my computer—for a price
item.description: The desktop app can automate all kinds of tedious computing tasks, but the costs can quickly get out of hand. With help from AI, I finally tackled some computer chores that I’ve been putting off for months.

item.title: Trump plans to redesign D.C.’s public golf course on top of East Wing rubble
item.description: The reported name, ‘Washington National,’ naturally follows the naming convention of clubs privately owned by Trump. The remains of the East Wing of the White House could one day be buried under a golf course designed by the president who ordered its demolition in the first place.

item.title: This powerful robotic pool cleaner has hit its best-ever price in Amazons Spring Sale — save over $300
item.description: As of March 26, the iGarden Robotic Pool Cleaner K Series is down to its best ever price of $499.98 on Amazon, 38% off its list price of $799.99.
